name: Silk Cell
explanation: A warm 8-bit sampler in the E-mu Emulator II lineage. It plays a baked, self-authored CC0 sample - a warm detuned-saw string/choir ensemble tone, gently low-passed and 8-bit crushed for the lush Emulator II warmth - pitched across the keyboard with an amp envelope and a resonant low-pass. A gentle Vibrato LFO keeps a held note alive. 6-voice poly. Controls: Tune, Cutoff, Attack, Decay, Vibrato and Level.
